weekly_summary.value: Client engaged daily across 8 days with generally positive mood early in the week, but reported recurring acidity/bloating, a low-energy and highly stressful Day 7 (falling asleep briefly during a work meeting), and improved sleep/energy by Day 8. Nutrition planning was a recurring struggle due to a hectic school/work schedule.

evidence.speaker: Client
evidence.quote: During a meeting today I was so tired that my head went down on the table and I actually slept for a few seconds.

evidence.speaker: Client
evidence.quote: Slept better last night, around 8 hours.

adherence.value: Inconsistent — breakfast protein missing on some days, salad skipped, vegetable stocking incomplete, ACV habit not yet established

evidence.speaker: Client
evidence.quote: No. I still need to stock vegetables properly. Will do it tomorrow.

evidence.speaker: Client
evidence.quote: Forgot ACV today. Not yet in the habit.

notes.value: Client incorporated coach suggestions such as boiled chana/moong/chhole and attempted slower eating at school lunches

evidence.quote: Lunch done. Trying to eat slowly.

steps.value: Reported figures: Day 3 ~8,000, Day 7 6,000, Day 8 ~8,000. No step data for Days 1, 2, 5, 6.

evidence.quote: Today's update: Water 4 litres, Sleep 5 hours, Steps around 8,000, Exercise only walking.

evidence.quote: Slept only around 5 hours last night.

evidence.quote: Slept better last night, around 8 hours.

quality_notes.value: Sleep deprivation linked to late nights and correlated with acidity and fatigue; notably better on Day 8

evidence.speaker: Client
evidence.quote: Water around 3.5 litres.

reported_symptoms.value: Acidity (Day 1, Day 2) and bloating (Day 2, Day 5, Day 6, Day 8); perceived weight gain despite reduced eating

evidence.speaker: Client
evidence.quote: Feeling some acidity since morning.

evidence.speaker: Client
evidence.quote: Bloating is back and I feel like I have gained weight.

evidence.speaker: Client
evidence.quote: Still having acidity and bloating.

evidence.quote: There is a lot of office pressure and politics going on.

evidence.speaker: Client
evidence.quote: Feeling very low.

level.value: High — client sent updates on all 8 days across sleep, water, steps, meals, and symptoms

evidence.quote: Breakfast was 1.5 vegetable chapatis with seeds and ajwain.

responsiveness.value: Generally responsive same-day, with one missed accountability call on Day 7

key_barriers.description: Difficulty stocking vegetables and planning meals in advance due to hectic school/work schedule

evidence.speaker: Client
evidence.quote: I am not getting enough time to plan meals. Next week should be easier.

key_barriers.description: ACV habit not yet established despite coach reminder

evidence.speaker: Client
evidence.quote: Forgot ACV today. Not yet in the habit.

risk_flags.flag: Acute fatigue / possible sleep deficit impacting work functioning
risk_flags.rule_triggered: Client reported falling asleep involuntarily during a work meeting combined with same-day extreme low mood

evidence.speaker: Client
evidence.quote: During a meeting today I was so tired that my head went down on the table and I actually slept for a few seconds.

risk_flags.rule_triggered: Bloating and/or acidity reported on 4 or more of 8 covered days without resolution

evidence.speaker: Client
evidence.quote: Still having acidity and bloating.

evidence.speaker: Client
evidence.quote: Still having bloating on and off.

coach_recommendations.recommendation: Follow up directly on Day 7 fatigue/stress episode and assess workload and sleep recovery before continuing standard nutrition coaching pace

evidence.speaker: Coach
evidence.quote: That sounds like a very exhausting day. Please rest today. We also need to look at your sleep and stress more carefully.

coach_recommendations.recommendation: Help client build a simple, low-effort meal-prep routine given repeated barrier of limited planning time

evidence.speaker: Coach
evidence.quote: That could be one of the main barriers right now. Let's keep the plan practical.
